name: NL INDUSTRIES INC
business: NL Industries, Inc. is a holding company. Its majority-owned subsidiary CompX International Inc. manufactures engineered components including mechanical and electronic cabinet locks and marine components sold to various industries. It also holds a 31% noncontrolling interest in Kronos Worldwide, Inc., a leading global producer of titanium dioxide pigments used in coatings, plastics, paper, and other applications.
namedSuppliers: Rio Tinto Iron and Titanium Ltd

exposures.sentence: Kronos is a leading global producer and marketer of value-added titanium dioxide pigments, or TiO2, a base industrial product used in imparting whiteness, brightness, opacity and durability to a diverse range of customer applications and end-use markets, including coatings, plastics, paper, inks, cosmetics, pharmaceuticals and other industrial and consumer quality-of-life products.
Kronos owns and operates an ilmenite mine in Norway pursuant to a governmental concession with an unlimited term.

tamClaims.claim: TiO2 consumption has grown at a compound annual growth rate of approximately 3% since 2000.
tamClaims.sentence: According to industry estimates, TiO2 consumption has grown at a compound annual growth rate of approximately 3% since 2000.
